title: Vehicle battery tray with integrated battery retention and support features
abstract: A battery tray for an electric vehicle includes a battery support structure that has a floor and a perimeter wall extending around a peripheral portion of the floor to border a battery containment area. A plurality of cross members are coupled with the perimeter wall at opposing sides of the battery support structure, where the cross members extend laterally across the battery containment area. A cover is engaged with an upper portion of the perimeter wall of the battery support structure. The cover, the floor, and/or the cross members may include a retention element that is integrally formed therewith and that is configured to engage a component that is disposed in the battery containment area.
claims:
Claims 1. A battery tray for an electric vehicle, said battery tray comprising: a battery support structure having a floor and a perimeter wall extending around a peripheral portion of the floor to border a battery containment area; a plurality of cross members coupled with the perimeter wall at opposing sides of the battery support structure, wherein the plurality of cross members extend laterally across the battery containment area; a cover engaged with an upper portion of the perimeter wall of the battery support structure; and wherein at least one of the cover, the floor, or the cross members includes a retention element integrally formed therewith that is configured to engage a component that is disposed in the battery containment area. 2. The battery tray of claim 1 , wherein the retention element comprises a battery bracing element that is disposed at the cover and that protrudes downward into the battery containment area. 3. The battery tray of claim 2, wherein the battery bracing element includes a corner bracing portion that is configured to engage an upper corner portion of a battery module. 4. The battery tray of claim 2, wherein the retention element couples with at least one of the plurality of cross members. 5. The battery tray of claim 1 , wherein the retention element is configured to engage an upper portion of a battery module disposed in the battery containment area. 6. The battery tray of any of the preceding claims, wherein the retention element engages a component that is selected from the group consisting of a coolant line, an electrical cable, a portion of a fire suppression system, and a portion of a battery module. 7. The battery tray of claim 1, wherein the retention element comprises a channel integrally formed at an upright side surface of a cross member of the plurality of cross members. 8. The battery tray of claim 7, wherein the channel extends horizontally along a length of the cross member, and wherein the channel is configured to receive at least one of a wire, cooling line, or a support bracket of a battery module disposed in the battery containment area. 9. The battery tray of claim 1 , wherein the retention element comprises a pair of channels integrally formed at upright side surfaces of an adjacent pair of the plurality of the cross members. 10. The battery tray of claim 9, wherein the pair of channels face each other and are configured to receive a support bracket that spans between and engages each of the pair of channels for suspending a battery module away from the floor of the battery support structure. 11. The battery tray of claim 9 or 10, wherein the adjacent pair of cross members include hollow interior areas that extend along a length of the adjacent pair of cross members. 12. The battery tray of claim 1 , further comprising a battery module disposed at the battery containment area between two adjacent cross members of the plurality of cross members. 13. The battery tray of claim 12, wherein the plurality of cross members integrally extend upward from the floor of the battery support structure, and wherein the plurality of cross members are coupled with the perimeter wall at opposing sides of the battery support structure. 14. The battery tray of claim 12, wherein the retention element comprises a battery bracing element that is disposed at the cover and that is configured to engage the battery module disposed in the battery containment area. 15. The battery tray of claim 14, wherein the battery bracing element disposed at the cover protrudes downward into the battery containment area to engage an upper corner of the battery module. 16. The battery tray of claim 1, wherein the retention element comprises an upper flange integrally protruding from an end casting of a battery module disposed at the battery containment area between two adjacent cross members and engaged with at least one of the two adjacent cross members. 17. The battery tray of claim 16, further comprising a fastener that extends though the upper flange to attach at the engaged adjacent cross member. 18. The battery tray of claim 1 , wherein the battery retention element comprises a base support that integrally protrudes upward from the floor of the battery support structure and is configured to engage a lower portion of a battery module. 19. The battery tray of claim 18, wherein the battery support structure includes a tub component that comprises a sheet molding compound, and wherein the cross members integrally interconnecting with the floor of the tub component and opposing sides of the perimeter wall of the tub component. 20. The battery tray of claim 18, wherein the base support that integrally protrudes upward from the tub component and comprises the sheet molding compound. 21. A battery tray for an electric vehicle, said battery tray comprising: a battery support structure having a floor, a perimeter wall extending around a peripheral portion of the floor, and a plurality of cross members extending laterally across a battery containment area between the perimeter wall at opposing sides of the battery support structure; a battery module disposed in the battery containment area between two adjacent cross members of the plurality of cross members; and 

 wherein at least a portion of the battery support structure or a portion of the battery module includes a retention element integrally formed therewith that is configured to secure the battery module in the battery containment area. 22. The battery tray of claim 21, wherein the retention element includes a mounting feature integrally formed at an upright side surface of at least one of the plurality of cross members, and wherein the mounting feature is configured to receive at least one of a wire, cooling line, and support bracket of the battery module. 23. The battery tray of claim 21 , further comprising a cover engaged with an upper portion of the perimeter wall of the battery support structure, wherein the retention element is integrally formed with at least one of the cover, the floor, or at least one of the cross members. 24. The battery tray of claim 23, wherein the retention element comprises a battery bracing element that is disposed at the cover and that protrudes downward into the battery containment area. 25. The battery tray of claim 24, wherein the battery bracing element includes a corner bracing portion that is configured to engage an upper corner portion of a battery module. 26. The battery tray of claim 24, wherein the retention element couples with at least one of the plurality of cross members. 27. The battery tray of claim 21 , wherein the retention element engages a component that is selected from the group consisting of a coolant line, an electrical cable, a portion of a fire suppression system, and a portion of a battery module. 28. The battery tray of claim 21 , wherein the retention element comprises a channel integrally formed at an upright side surface of a cross member of the plurality of cross members. 29. The battery tray of any of claim 28, wherein the channel extends horizontally along a length of the cross member. 30. The battery tray of any of claim 29, wherein the channel is configured to receive at least one of a wire, cooling line, or a support bracket of a battery module disposed in the battery containment area. 31. The battery tray of claim 21 , wherein the retention element comprises a pair of channels integrally formed at upright side surfaces of an adjacent pair of the plurality of the cross members. 32. The battery tray of claim 31 , wherein the pair of channels face each other and are configured to receive a support bracket that spans between and engages each of the pair of channels for suspending a battery module away from the floor of the battery support structure. 33. The battery tray of claim 31 , wherein the adjacent pair of cross members include hollow interior areas that extend along a length of the adjacent pair of cross members. 34. The battery tray of any of claims 21-33, wherein the plurality of cross members integrally extend upward from the floor of the battery support structure, and wherein the plurality of cross members are coupled with the perimeter wall at opposing sides of the battery support structure. 35. The battery tray of claim 21 , wherein the battery retention element comprises a base support that integrally protrudes upward from the floor of the battery support structure and is configured to engage a lower portion of a battery module. 36. The battery tray of claim 21 , wherein the battery support structure includes a tub component that comprises a sheet molding compound, and wherein the cross members integrally interconnecting with the floor of the tub component and opposing sides of the perimeter wall of the tub component. 37. The battery tray of claim 36, wherein the base support that integrally protrudes upward from the tub component and comprises the sheet molding compound. 38. A cross member for a vehicle battery tray, said cross member comprising: an elongated beam having opposing ends configured to couple with opposing perimeter reinforcement members that at least partially borders a containment area of the battery tray; wherein the beam includes a mounting feature disposed at a side surface of the beam; and wherein the mounting feature is configured to engage a component that is disposed in the containment area.
